title: chrysanthemum flaveolum
intro: Chrysanthemum flaveolum, also known as the yellow chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum flaveolum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential in treating certain types of cancer. Chrysanthemum flaveolum is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
